title: PRDescription
description: Validates the frontmatter of a PR description produced by polymath-release:pr.

title.description: Short title for the PR, matches the commit headline.

scope.description: Single Conventional Commits scope; one scope per PR.

linked_prd.description: Path to docs/prds/<slug>.md if the PR is PRD-driven, or empty string.

related_links.description: ADRs / issues / experiments / threat models linked by the PR.

rollback_plan.description: Even "revert this PR" is a valid plan; emptiness is not.

feature_flag.description: Feature-flag key gating the rollout, if any.
